scenarios.name: Conflict Resolution (Multi-Step)
retrievedContent: API version is v1 with REST endpoints
Upgraded API to v2, added GraphQL alongside REST
Deprecated REST in v2.1, GraphQL is now the only supported API
Backend lead left, team is 4 engineers: 2 backend, 2 frontend
Hired 2 frontend engineers, team is now 5 total
Team size is 3 backend engineers

scenarios.name: Context Continuity
scenarios.reason: Missing keywords: [rate limiting]. Found: [Hono, Lucia, Turso]
retrievedContent: Session 3: Migrated database from SQLite to Turso for edge deployment
Session 1: Set up the project with Hono framework on Cloudflare Workers
Session 2: Added authentication using Lucia Auth with GitHub OAuth provider

scenarios.name: Cross-Agent Handoff
retrievedContent: Bug report: users experiencing 502 errors on the /api/billing endpoint during peak hours
Root cause: connection pool exhaustion. Max connections set to 10, need at least 50 for peak load
Fix applied: increased connection pool to 100, added connection timeout of 5 seconds

scenarios.name: Preference Application
retrievedContent: User prefers TypeScript with strict mode enabled for all projects
Database preference: PostgreSQL 16 with pgvector extension
Default deploy target is Fly.io with auto-scaling enabled
User prefers TypeScript with strict mode enabled for all projects
Default deploy target is Fly.io with auto-scaling enabled
Database preference: PostgreSQL 16 with pgvector extension

scenarios.name: Redundancy Check
retrievedContent: The application uses Redis for caching with a 15-minute TTL
Search is powered by Meilisearch with auto-indexing on model save
File uploads are stored in S3-compatible MinIO with 50MB size limit
Background jobs are processed by BullMQ with 3 worker threads
Email notifications are sent via Resend with rate limit of 100 per hour
